evolutionSummary:
In the recent project evolution, we processed a total of 139 items, comprising 103 issues and 36 pull requests (PRs). Throughout this period, we successfully identified and documented new devices, contributing to our growing database of supported hardware. Notably, no new feature proposals (FPs) were introduced, indicating a focus on refining existing functionalities rather than expanding the scope.

Despite the high volume of issues processed, we have yet to close any issues, highlighting ongoing challenges that require further attention. The team has actively engaged in discussions and resolutions, with two responses recorded, demonstrating our commitment to addressing community feedback and enhancing user experience.

Moving forward, key action items include prioritizing the resolution of outstanding issues, fostering collaboration on PRs to expedite their review and integration, and continuing to explore and document new devices to ensure comprehensive support. This strategic focus will help streamline project development and improve overall project health.
